name: gtm-strategy
description: Cold-audit GTM strategy flow for IT agencies. From a website URL: diagnose agency stage, then build ICP, competitor + gap analysis, stage-gated positioning, value prop, offers, buyer journey, and recommend marketing materials / lead-gen channels / internal docs — ending in a 30-90-180 action plan. Stage-adaptive, checkpointed, outputs to Notion in Ukrainian.

linkedin_li_at.title: LinkedIn li_at cookie
linkedin_li_at.description: LinkedIn session cookie (li_at). Used by cookie-based Apify actors to pull full employee roster, headcount and 6m/1y/2y growth + median tenure for the Intake step. Optional — without it, headcount trend falls back to a pasted LinkedIn Premium value.
